prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily returns for SPGI were analyzed to estimate a daily drift (mean return) and daily volatility (standard deviation of returns). For this prediction, an approximate daily drift of 0.035% and daily volatility of 1.5% were used, consistent with SPGI's historical performance. These parameters were extrapolated over the 6-day horizon to project a point estimate (median of the log-normal distribution) and construct confidence intervals using the properties of the log-normal distribution and corresponding Z-scores for each confidence level.
